title: Is Robinhood Deeply Undervalued?
text: Robinhood Markets Inc. ( HOOD , Financial) is the parent company of the widely popular stock trading app which pioneered the concept of commission-free trading in 2013. Robinhood makes the majority of its revenue from “payment for order flow," which is a small fee that is taken from the difference between the “buy/sell spread” for retail and institutional investors.
